verdict: Replacement L12_T24 chunk001 completed with production-phase metadata, same-source dE/ds response, same-source scalar C_ss(q) rows for the four-mode/x16 plan, and numba_gauge_seed_v1 seed control.  The combiner counts it as 1 ready chunk out of 63 needed for the L12 set.  This is useful production support, but it is not PR #230 closure because the L12 set is incomplete and L16/L24 scaling, pole-derivative, model-class, FV/IR, and Higgs-identity gates remain open.
